title: Brynhildr in the Darkness
sourceNotes: Single-cour 13-episode TV anime (ARMS, 2014); a separate bonus OVA (AniList id 20866) is excluded as side content rather than counted as a 14th episode, matching this repo's OVA convention. Manga complete at 181 chapters / 18 volumes. The anime heavily compresses and reorders manga material to reach a stopping point around chapter 100 by its finale; no official or fan-sourced episode-by-episode breakdown exists, so the single TV-run entry below is an approximate aggregate rather than a scene-accurate boundary. Chapters 101-181 continue the manga-only story past where the anime ends.
